title: Aqua Laguna Closes In
description: The rescue force launches into the storm after the Sea Train, beginning the road to Enies Lobby.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Galley-La shipwright, Luffy, Nico Robin, Kokoro, Nami. The rescue force launches into the storm after the Sea Train, beginning the road to Enies Lobby.

dialogue.speaker: Galley-La shipwright
dialogue.text: Entrance to shipwright Island's Blue Station

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: CPS will be here in person.

dialogue.speaker: Kokoro
dialogue.text: get on board the "sea train" first.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's only natural that you'd surrender.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: government officials, some marines... and Nico Robin-chan...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Now... How do I get on board...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Forgive me for the wait, Nico Robin- chan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What strength! So that's the CPP...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: This isn't a game. Brace yourselves!!

summary: The rescue force launches into the storm after the Sea Train, beginning the road to Enies Lobby.
